acceptance_condition: br show flywheel-3kq --json | jq -e 'if type == "array" then .[0] else . end | .id == "flywheel-3kq" and .status != "blocked"'
foundational_rule: A Beads status=blocked row must have an executable blocker-discipline file before it can be treated as stable state.
next_action: Reduce the class with concrete child slices: add cleanup traps to one mutating surface at a time and prove the inventory count moves.
